description_long: This object consists of a rectangular metal serving tray with a slightly raised blue rim, holding six white cylindrical cups. The cups feature a repeating red decorative motif, including a central double happiness symbol and floral patterns, encircling the upper and lower portions. Five of the cups are placed upside down, while one is upright, all arranged neatly within the tray. The tray's surface is smooth and glossy, with a clean white finish and a thin blue border along the edge. The cups appear to be made of ceramic or porcelain, with a hard, glossy surface. The overall set exudes a traditional, possibly East Asian aesthetic, suitable for communal or celebratory use in urban environments.
description: A white metal serving tray with a blue rim holds six white cups decorated with red traditional motifs, five inverted and one upright. The set has a glossy finish and a clean, organized appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tray with five inverted cups and one upright cup at the front, clearly displaying the red decorative motifs.
description_view_1: Side view with the upright cup now on the left, providing a clear look at the tray's blue rim and the arrangement of the cups.
description_view_2: Rear view showing all six cups, mostly inverted, with the red motifs visible on the sides and the tray's interior mostly covered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the upright cup now on the right, highlighting the symmetry of the cup arrangement and the tray's blue edge.
attribute_rim_design: The tray has a slightly raised, thin rim with a blue edge, approximately 1.5 cm high, flat on top, and smoothly rounded with no decorative grooves or lips.
attribute_decorative_patterns: The cups feature red geometric and floral motifs, including a prominent double happiness symbol and surrounding floral bands, covering the upper and lower thirds of each cup. The tray itself is plain white with a blue rim and no additional decoration.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surfaces of both the tray and cups are glossy, producing visible highlights and mild reflections, especially on curved surfaces. The blue rim is also glossy, but no mirror-like reflections are present.
